description_long: This is a pair of round-lensed glasses with a full-rim frame, featuring thin, straight temples that extend from the circular rims. The lenses are dark and opaque, suggesting a sunglass or protective eyewear function. The bridge connecting the two lenses is a simple, narrow bar with a slight curve, seamlessly joining the rims. The temples are slender and unadorned, with a consistent width and no visible embellishments or patterns. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with a retro-inspired round geometry reminiscent of classic eyewear styles. No visible brand markings or logos are present on any part of the frame.
description: A pair of round, dark-lensed glasses with a thin, minimalist full-rim frame and straight, unadorned temples. The design is simple and retro, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the perfectly round, dark lenses and the thin, full-rim frame with a simple bridge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the lenses and the straight, slender temples extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the round lens backs and the full length of the temples, which are thin and unembellished.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the lens thickness and the straight, narrow temples.
attribute_frame_design: The frame features a classic round geometry with a full-rim structure, thin and uniform in thickness throughout. The temples are straight and slender, lacking any curvature or decorative elements, and the overall style is minimalist and retro-inspired.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark and opaque, with a uniform tint that appears black or very dark gray, providing a strong shading effect without visible gradient or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a simple, narrow bar with a slight curve, directly connecting the two round rims without any additional nose pads or embellishments.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin, straight, and unadorned, with no visible patterns, engravings, or decorative features. Their design is consistent and minimalist.
